name: Wallet Stalker Live
description: Tracks selected public wallets, emits wallet-flow alerts, and can create capped user-confirmed copy intents when conditions match.
degenPitch: Watch the wallets that move first, then decide if you want the trade.
whatItDoes: Tracks buys, sells, rotations, and new position alerts for selected wallets.
Applies wallet allow/block lists and risk caps before any copy intent.
Keeps wallet alerts receipt-gated when sold as a paid feed.
cursorPrompt: Build a Wallet Stalker Live agent with DNA x402. Track public wallets, sell receipt-gated alerts, create optional user-confirmed copy intents, respect wallet allowlists and risk caps, and never backend sign.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Wallet Stalker Live agent with DNA x402. Track public wallets, sell receipt-gated alerts, create optional user-confirmed copy intents, respect wallet allowlists and risk caps, and never backend sign.
exampleFlow: Optional trade intent waits for client signature
receiptProofBehavior: Optional trade intent binds wallet source and riskConfigHash.
